texto: And yet, for the fully modern being, not being able to tweet or otherwise " share" - feelings, opinions, thoughts, jokes, links to cat videos or pictures of dinner - for even an hour is akin to eternal exile in the desert, and hence in part the rising tide of juror-caused mistrials across the planet.
explicacao: Citação de Christie Blatchford sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “And yet, for the fully modern being, not being able to tweet or otherwise " share" - feelings, op…” articula sabedoria, jurors, social-media em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como social-media.
